dismissalText.commentary: Abishek Porel c †Dahiya b Dubey 22 (18b 4x4 0x6 24m) SR: 122.22

dismissalComment.html: A fine nick and Dahiya makes amends, taking a good low catch, diving forward. On a length angling away from Porel outside off stump. He pushes at it, only manages a thin edge and Dahiya does the rest. The umpire checks with the third umpire if the ball carried, all good. Porel walks back

dismissalText.commentary: KL Rahul c Powell b Roy 60 (30b 5x4 4x6 67m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: got him!! This ball is much slower and wide of off, and Rahul falls in the trap. Roy keeps bowling wide of off, but this time hardly offers any pace to work with. The ball is full and around seventh stump, and Rahul reaches out to have a swing at it. He can barely get it to long-on, though, as Powell moves forward to catch the ball

dismissalText.commentary: Axar Patel c Singh b Varun 39 (25b 3x4 2x6 43m) SR: 156

dismissalComment.html: taken at long-on!! A hint of the Rahul dismissal by Roy from early in the day. Like Roy, Varun goes slow and wide of off to tempt the batter. This one is full and wide, and turns away to finish even wider. Axar looks to swing down the ground, but finds Rinku at long-on. The ball went off the bottom of the bat there

dismissalText.commentary: David Miller c Allen b Dubey 28 (19b 0x4 3x6 47m) SR: 147.36

dismissalComment.html: taken at mid-off!! Miller looks frustrated. It was there to be hit. A low full toss outside off, and Miller opens the face of the bat to only loft it as far as mid-off. On most days, you'd expect that ball to land beyond the boundary

dismissalText.commentary: Manish Pandey c Starc b Ngidi 25 (16b 2x4 2x6 19m) SR: 156.25

dismissalComment.html: Has he taken that? Starc is claiming it! Wowza, that is a top, top catch by the fast bowler Slower and fullish in length outside off, Pandey skims this flat and low to the right of Starc at long-on. He sprints in, dives, gets both hands together and completes a stunner. The third umpire is called to check if Starc has taken that cleanly. Oh, he has.
